name: Chicken Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces No Yolks® egg noodle substitute, cooked
1 pound ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain.
4. Meanwhile, cook chicken, onions, and bell peppers in oil until no pink remains in the chicken and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in salt, black pepper, tomato sauce; set aside.
6. In a mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, sour cream, and cream cheese.
7. Spread half noodles in prepared pan.
8. Then, cover with the cheese mixture.
9. Add remaining noodles.
10. Top with chicken-tomato mixture.
11. Bake for 30 minutes.
